response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a capable full-stack engineer with 16+ years of general software development experience, but this Staff GenAI role requires 8+ years specifically building production-grade AI solutions — a threshold he does not come close to meeting. His AI-adjacent work is limited to roughly 6 months at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflow tooling), with no demonstrated experience in Python, vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks such as LangGraph or CrewAI. His breadth across systems is real, but the AI depth required for a Staff-level forward-deployed GenAI engineer is absent.
strengths: Long track record with TypeScript and Node.js in production environments across multiple companies
Recent direct exposure to MCP (Model Context Protocol) servers and agentic workflow infrastructure at re:cinq
AWS CDK usage at Optilyz demonstrates at least entry-level cloud platform familiarity
concerns: Python does not appear anywhere in skills or work history, despite being a core stated requirement
AI/ML-specific experience totals roughly 6 months; the role requires 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions
No evidence of vector databases, RAG architectures, LLM evaluation pipelines, or multi-agent frameworks anywhere in the resume
